programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When murder comes to play at a high-stakes poker game, Mac and his team work to find out why. In Central Park's Strawberry Fields, Hawkes and Danny come across a body they instantly recognise: a TV weather girl.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: In a New York doll "hospital", Mac and Danny recover the corpse of the doll "doctor". Meanwhile, Stella and Hawkes find a young woman dead in her apartment.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A roller derby star drops dead in the middle of a match, and Mac and Stella come to the rink to investigate. Hawkes and Danny unravel the mystery of why a struggling novelist was killed.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A billionaire is found dead and when Danny begins to process the scene, he trips a 'panic' button, sealing himself in with the body. And who pushed a stripper onto a 10,000-degree spotlight and left her to sizzle?

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac, Hawkes and Danny investigate the death of two models at New York City's hottest fashion show. Stella and Lindsay use blood recovered from leeches to prove a man's innocence.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and Hawkes investigate the suspicious death of a free climber. Danny and Stella unravel the mystery of a world famous designer, and Aiden revisits an unsolved rape case.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and Hawkes explore the gruesome death of a man, murdered in Grand Central Station, while Stella and Danny investigate why a blind woman was left strangled on a rooftop.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: It's mayhem at the Bronx Zoo. Mac, Danny and new CSI Lindsay look into the death of a man thrown to the tigers, and Stella and Hawkes are called in to find an elegantly dressed young woman dead on a carousel.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A man is found beaten to death at the San Gennaro festival leads Mac and Stella from the alleys to the power players of Wall Street. As Hawkes probes the death of a young boy trapped in an apartment fire.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac, Stella and Lindsay try to discover why a young dancer was thrown from a tram. As Hawkes and Danny wonder if a man's obsession with getting his son into an elite preschool leads to his own death.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: As the CSIs track down a witness to a brutal slaying, they uncover the world of Manhattan "Lolitas", young girls who trawl for older men. A body with two identities is discovered in the boat pond in Central Park.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac, Lindsay and Hawkes investigate what looks to be a prank. Stella and Danny try to find out if a broker found hanging out of his office window committed suicide or if he was an office politics victim.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When the host of an art show Stella is attending is skewered to his date, she knows that her evening will be all work and no play. And the dead body of a music promoter is found entirely covered in the glue.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Stella and Mac examine a case in which a man was shot because of the city's dangerous water gun wars.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a woman is found dead in her apartment building's water tower, Mac and Lindsay team up to find her killer. Meanwhile, Stella and Hawkes find their victim in a playground.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and Stella discover a corpse being devoured by beetles at a museum. As they search for the villain behind the gruesome crime, Danny and Flack examine a case in which a man was insulated to death.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac, Danny and Flack investigate the death of a medical intern and an illegal organ trafficking job. As Stella and Lindsey look into the death of a young woman found with a bicycle spoke stuck in her neck.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a patient from a mental hospital, is found dead in an alleyway Mac and Stella retrace his steps to find his murderer. As Danny and Lindsay find a popular football star murdered in his luxurious hotel suite.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When an anonymous caller tells Mac there is a dead body buried at Giant's Stadium, evidence points to one of the CSIs. Across, town Stella and Danny find a banker stabbed to death in his hotel suite.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a limo driver at a Kid Rock concert. Meanwhile, Mac finds Stella, unconscious and battered, in her apartment.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When Danny and Lindsey discover a young woman's body, dressed as a mermaid and floating in a bed of kelp. Meanwhile, Mac and Stella investigate the death of a man who is survived by his two wives.

programme.desc: When a Marine is found dead in Central Park, Mac uses his military wits to solve the crime; across town, the team investigate the death of a woman found in a torched car.

programme.desc: Mac and Flack rush to the scene of a crime. While investigating the murder, a bomb is detonated and Flack is sent to the hospital with severe injuries.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: While investigating the death of a hotel employee at a swimsuit modelling shoot, the CSI team hears shots across the street and run to another crime scene where a shocked woman has just shot an intruder.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A young woman dies after she starts bleeding from her eyes, nose, and mouth while at a party aboard a subway train, leading the team to speculate that she is the victim of a biological attack.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs are called in when a young paintball champion is found dead in a warehouse. They soon find out that his fiercest rival, with whom he was faced in a death match, has gone missing.

programme.desc: A parachute jumper meets his death when his parachute is struck by a flock of pigeons, all of which strangely end up dead beside his body.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs are called in when a bartender is robbed and shot. When the police capture a suspect matching a witness' description, the team is stunned when the suspect is Sheldon Hawkes.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and Hawkes have a problem when they find out that the family of a murder victim are all deaf, so they have to find a new way to catch the killer.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Following the largest drug seizure in New York history, Mac and the CSIs must save the lab and face one of their toughest challenges yet.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and the team find human blood on the crown of the Statue of Liberty, leading them in a race against time to save a famous musician from death at the hands of a vigilante.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A sailboat race to Staten Island takes an unexpected tack when one of the boats nearly collides with a dead scuba diving instructor.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate a James Bond-esque gang of thieves who use high tech methods to steal personal account information from computers and phones.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A dying man confesses to a murder 24 hours before it happens and Mac investigates the possibility of time travel.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A murder victim bears a striking resemblance to a well-known avatar in the online role-playing game Second Life. Mac is forced to enter the game himself to solve the mystery surrounding her death.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Danny and Lindsay investigate a mass murder at the infamous Amityville Horror house. Before Lindsay can close the case, she is warned by someone to leave the house, or she will be in great danger.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Danny and Lindsay investigate the death of a woman shot dead on the steps of the Metropolitan Museum of Art while Mac and Stella investigate the death of a man stabbed to death in Madison Square Park.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a supermodel is found dead in a giant martini glass on a Times Square billboard, the CSI team follows the evidence in search of the party crasher.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac investigates a groom murdered on his wedding day, found stuffed and wrapped like a wedding present. Stella finds a box of blood spattered puzzle pieces left on her car, which links to Mac's past.

programme.desc: Mac goes home to Chicago, trying to solve the mystery of the 333 stalker. Meanwhile, back in New York, the 333 stalker targets the rest of the CSI team.

programme.desc: Police find the bodies of two young women in a freezer, possibly lured to their death by the same murderer.

programme.desc: A man who raped two women in 1990 is put behind bars thirty years later thanks to advancements in science.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: In 1993, gay men in London were being terrorised. For three months, Colin Ireland hunted men, picking them up in bars and strangling them. We talk to Ireland's ex-wife and friends to reveal what made him tick.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: Rolf Harris was considered one of the country's best loved entertainers until he was accused of a string of historic indecent assaults. Unlike Jimmy Savile, he was still alive to be brought to justice.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain

programme.desc: A motel guest is tripped during a chase, officers apprehend a robbery suspect, and a car thief claims to be picking up the stolen vehicle's owner.

programme.title: Cops Reloaded
programme.desc: Juveniles are arrested for holding up a restaurant. A woman is found to have $9000 worth of warrants. A dope dealer states he sells to survive. A couple is accused of assaulting their roommate.

programme.title: Cops Reloaded
programme.desc: Las Vegas Police search for a robbery suspect. Sacramento officers question a man found in a gang area. A man is suspected of causing a disturbance on a trolley. A traffic stop ends in an arrest.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These deadly women wouldn't accept rejection and refused to take no for an answer; they insisted that they'd cling till death.

programme.title: Murder at First Swipe

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman tells investigators that a man broke into her home wearing only underwear and gloves, killed her boyfriend, and raped and terrorised her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After a Delaware man's mother is found dead, he tells a story that's so improbable police think it can't possibly be true.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A family vacation turns into a terrifying search for a missing wife and baby, then becomes a manhunt for a killer who committed a horrific crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Green Eyed Killers

programme.title: Green Eyed Killers
programme.desc: In Deltona, Patrick De La Cerda is shot after expecting a package. His fiancee suspects a jealous ex-boyfriend who's been stalking her. Detectives find a missing laptop tied to the crime.

programme.title: Green Eyed Killers
programme.desc: Shayna Hubers shoots boyfriend Ryan Poston, claiming self-defence. Inconsistencies in her story and behaviour raise suspicions, leading detectives to question if it's a defence or a jealous crime.

programme.title: Green Eyed Killers
programme.desc: In Lithia, Kay Baker is found dead, and blood leads to her partner, Matthew Terry. Though he claims to be a victim, detectives uncover his violent past and suspect him in her death.

programme.title: Cold Blood
programme.desc: Shannon Conway's body is found dumped by the roadside. Investigators zero in on a number of suspects from the hippy community who hang out there but it will take over a decade to track down Shannon's killer.

programme.desc: Tackling the big stories from all angles and perspectives. Weekdays from midday, Tom Harwood and Emily Carver bring you the most compelling stories from across the United Kingdom.

programme.title: Martin Daubney
programme.desc: Join Martin for an up-to-the-minute take on the day's events delivered in his own unique and lively style.

programme.title: Dewbs & Co
programme.desc: Plain-speaking, straight-talking - Michelle delivers her individual take on the day's news.

programme.title: Farage
programme.desc: Nigel Farage doesn't hold back in his GB News prime-time show. Hear his views and give your own in an action-packed hour of discussion and debate. Join Nigel as he takes on the big stories other media don't want to touch.

programme.title: Jacob Rees-Mogg's State of the Nation
programme.desc: ...Nation. Join Jacob for his unique and unmissable take on the day's news.

programme.title: Patrick Christys Tonight
programme.desc: Join Patrick for two hours of spirited debate and news making interviews. Top guests tackle the issues that matter, with a sharp take on every story.

programme.title: Patrick Christys Tonight Late Edition
programme.desc: ...Edition. Tomorrow's news, tonight. All the major stories making the front pages and full coverage of all the breaking news at home and abroad with Patrick Christys.

programme.title: The Late Show Live
programme.desc: Live from Washington DC, Bev Turner and Ben Leo bring you the latest from the US and what it means for Britain.

programme.title: Carlito's Way
programme.desc: An ex-con sprung from prison stuns the New York underworld by vowing to go straight from a history of violence, but his plans are undermined by misguided loyalties and an outmoded code of honour.

programme.title: Casino
programme.desc: Greed, deception, money, power, and murder occur between two mobster best friends and a trophy wife over a gambling empire.

programme.desc: An Irish-American cop in New York befriends an 'innocent' immigrant from Belfast. He turns out to be an IRA rebel on a terrorist mission.

programme.sub-title: Life and the Wild Rivers of Northern Kyushu
programme.desc: Travel northern Kyushu on the JR Kyudai Line that follows the course of the Chikugo River and its tributaries. Discover how residents live with the blessings and trouble the wild rivers bring.

programme.title: Japanology Plus mini
programme.desc: Due to their small size or unusual shape, many types of fish are discarded. But as the global catch of fish dwindles, these "unused fish" offer immense potential and a path to fishing sustainability.

programme.title: Texico
programme.desc: Learn the principles of programming without a computer. Animated characters provide fun and lucid explanations of 5 core processes: analysis, combination, generalization, abstraction, and simulation.

programme.title: Samurai Castles
programme.desc: Himeji Castle, a UNESCO World Heritage Site, boasts the tallest, extant main keep in Japan. The elegant main keep and the sub-keeps are connected by corridors, forming a sturdy defense.

programme.title: Hit the Road 5min
programme.desc: One of the most appealing features of Japan's national road network is the various Michinoeki, literally way stations, that provide a place for motorists to rest, dine and shop.

programme.title: Ukiyoe EDO-LIFE
programme.desc: Centuries ago, Tokyo was known as EDO. More than a million people enjoyed life in this city, they live on in ukiyo-e woodblock prints. Take a deep dive into ukiyo-e and explore the soul of old Tokyo.

programme.title: GRAND SUMO Highlights
programme.desc: NHK WORLD-JAPAN presents a sumo highlights program for fans around the globe. Today the show features all top-division bouts from March 10, Day 3 of the Grand Sumo Tournament in Osaka.

programme.title: CINEMATIC JOURNEY
programme.desc: Join our explorers as they pursue the cinematic beauty of Japan. Kyle Card hikes the newly designated long trail around majestic Mt. Fuji and discovers its secrets.

programme.title: Ukiyoe EDO-LIFE
programme.sub-title: Inner Conflict of the Human Soul
programme.desc: We visit the Yoshiwara district, Edo's most prominent pleasure quarters. Among the lavish spenders, courtesans and apprentices, small humanoid creatures scurry about - what could they be up to?

programme.title: BOSAI: Science that Can Save Your Life
programme.desc: What is causing the frequent torrential rain and floods in Japan? Linear rainbands. Find out why this phenomenon is hard to predict and the latest research on forecasting linear rainbands.

programme.title: DESIGN MUSEUM JAPAN
programme.desc: Hishikawa Seiichi (Video and craft artist) visits Tottori. Dyeing firms make fishing flags with vivid, hand-drawn designs that carry the feelings of both fishermen and people sending them gifts.

programme.sub-title: Kabuki Dance for Tachiyaku Male Roles
programme.desc: Kabuki dance started as a showpiece for a female character, but then dances for male characters appeared - dances daring, comical, and acrobatic!

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Japan's Ongoing Challenges
programme.sub-title: The Long Path to Gender Equality
programme.desc: Forty years ago, Akamatsu Ryoko, a visionary woman advocated for the passage of Japan's Equal Employment Opportunity Act. Now, a new generation continues the fight for gender equality.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: GRAND SUMO Legends
programme.desc: Bulgarian-born Kotooshu was the first European to become an Ozeki. He even beat two powerful Yokozuna to win a tournament in 2008. We dive into his career through archival footage and interviews.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Samurai Castles
programme.desc: Himeji Castle, a UNESCO World Heritage Site, boasts the tallest, extant main keep in Japan. The elegant main keep and the sub-keeps are connected by corridors, forming a sturdy defense.

programme.title: Hit the Road 5min
programme.desc: One of the most appealing features of Japan's national road network is the various Michinoeki, literally way stations, that provide a place for motorists to rest, dine and shop.

programme.title: Ukiyoe EDO-LIFE
programme.desc: Centuries ago, Tokyo was known as EDO. More than a million people enjoyed life in this city, they live on in ukiyo-e woodblock prints. Take a deep dive into ukiyo-e and explore the soul of old Tokyo.

programme.title: GRAND SUMO Highlights
programme.desc: NHK WORLD-JAPAN presents a sumo highlights program for fans around the globe. Today the show features all top-division bouts from March 10, Day 3 of the Grand Sumo Tournament in Osaka.

programme.title: CINEMATIC JOURNEY
programme.desc: Join our explorers as they pursue the cinematic beauty of Japan. Kyle Card hikes the newly designated long trail around majestic Mt. Fuji and discovers its secrets.

programme.title: Ukiyoe EDO-LIFE
programme.sub-title: Inner Conflict of the Human Soul
programme.desc: We visit the Yoshiwara district, Edo's most prominent pleasure quarters. Among the lavish spenders, courtesans and apprentices, small humanoid creatures scurry about - what could they be up to?

programme.title: Sumopedia
programme.desc: Sumopedia enriches your sumo experience with insights into the sport's techniques, traditions and legendary wrestlers. While the rules are simple, this iconic Japanese sport has far more depth than meets the eye.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Design X Stories
programme.desc: Today's theme: Designing for portability. The spotlight is on portable and mobile designs. From lighting to houses and transport, explore the appeal and potential of designing for portability.

programme.title: Story Land
programme.desc: Leading actors take turns as solo storytellers to act and recite traditional folk tales loved in Japan for centuries. Watch out, too, for the delightful illustrations!

programme.title: Texico
programme.desc: Learn the principles of programming without a computer. Animated characters provide fun and lucid explanations of 5 core processes: analysis, combination, generalization, abstraction, and simulation.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Train Cruise
programme.sub-title: Life and the Wild Rivers of Northern Kyushu
programme.desc: Travel northern Kyushu on the JR Kyudai Line that follows the course of the Chikugo River and its tributaries. Discover how residents live with the blessings and trouble the wild rivers bring.

programme.title: Japanology Plus mini
programme.desc: Due to their small size or unusual shape, many types of fish are discarded. But as the global catch of fish dwindles, these "unused fish" offer immense potential and a path to fishing sustainability.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: BOSAI: Science that Can Save Your Life
programme.desc: What is causing the frequent torrential rain and floods in Japan? Linear rainbands. Find out why this phenomenon is hard to predict and the latest research on forecasting linear rainbands.

programme.title: DESIGN MUSEUM JAPAN
programme.desc: Hishikawa Seiichi (Video and craft artist) visits Tottori. Dyeing firms make fishing flags with vivid, hand-drawn designs that carry the feelings of both fishermen and people sending them gifts.

programme.title: KABUKI KOOL
programme.sub-title: Kabuki Dance for Tachiyaku Male Roles
programme.desc: Kabuki dance started as a showpiece for a female character, but then dances for male characters appeared - dances daring, comical, and acrobatic!

programme.title: The World Is Filled with Words
programme.desc: What are "words"? What does it mean to communicate? Deaf photographer Saito Harumichi seeks answers as he raises his hearing children and prepares an exhibition reflecting his quest for connection.

programme.title: Century Signboards
programme.desc: An oasis in the heart of Tokyo with ties to the post-World War II US occupation, this restaurant has shaped Japanese food trends for over 100 years.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: DOSUKOI Sumo Salon
programme.desc: Although it is rarely seen in regular bouts, usage of the underarm throw increases in high-stakes championship matches. We relive legendary moments and learn the secrets users of the technique.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: J-MELO
programme.desc: Tune in to J-MELO for great Japanese music! This week: Tsubaki Factory (a popular group in the Hello! Project collective) and Fukuhara Miho (a singer-songwriter with a soulful voice).

programme.title: Little Charo
programme.desc: Little Charo is an animation series about a Japanese dog who got lost in NY. "I want to see my owner again!" Charo starts his adventure back home. Season 1-10.

programme.title: Japanology Plus mini
programme.desc: In Japan, garbage is incinerated before being used for land reclamation, but space is running out. We explore new approaches to waste, such as biogas power generation and a litter-picking app.

programme.title: A Cat's-Eye View of Japan
programme.desc: Oolong lives at a guesthouse in Atami, a city nestled between the mountains and the sea. Elsewhere, six cats live in a house with an ocean view. They sometimes sit in on their owner's yoga lessons.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: CYCLE AROUND JAPAN Highlights
programme.sub-title: Kiso Three Rivers - Going with the Flow
programme.desc: Our cyclist travels three large rivers in central Japan: the Kiso, the Nagara and the Ibi. He explores unique cultures related to the rivers, like cormorant fishing and an exciting float festival.

programme.title: The Wakey Show
programme.desc: This episode features "FUNclusion Day," a day when people with and without disabilities can enjoy playing and chatting together, as well as other fun segments. It energizes kids.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Somewhere Street
programme.desc: Dumaguete, "the City of Gentle People", is on Negros Island in the tropical Philippines. It's a town of calm, kind-hearted people with several universities that add youthful, intellectual energy.

programme.title: The seasons of Yamato
programme.desc: A series of poetic videos by Koichi Hozan, a videographer living in Nara, in collaboration with a pianist, Mine Kawakami, for which she plays exclusive pieces, makes you experience each seasons.

programme.title: GRAND SUMO Highlights
programme.desc: NHK WORLD-JAPAN presents a sumo highlights program for fans around the globe. Today the show features all top-division bouts from March 10, Day 3 of the Grand Sumo Tournament in Osaka.

programme.desc: Sumopedia enriches your sumo experience with insights into the sport's techniques, traditions and legendary wrestlers. While the rules are simple, this iconic Japanese sport has far more depth than meets the eye.

programme.title: Laugh Then Think: Japan's Offbeat Sci...
programme.desc: An investigation of a female insect with a penis-like sex organ earned entomologist Yoshizawa Kazunori an Ig Nobel Prize in 2017. We learn about his lifelong quest to identify unknown species.

programme.title: Core Kyoto mini
programme.desc: The Culture of Gold Leaf, gossamer layers beget profound beauty. Dive deep into the ancient capital, still innovative 1,200 years after its foundation.

programme.title: Easy Japanese for Work
programme.sub-title: Identifying your chance to speak at a meeting
programme.desc: Today: identifying your chance to speak at a meeting. Timothy James Mahrt, from the United States, works at an IT firm in Tokyo. He has difficulty finding the right time to speak up.

programme.title: Zero Waste Life
programme.desc: Clockmaker Takumi Ada spends his days repairing clocks damaged in a massive earthquake that struck the Noto Peninsula in 2024. He also helps the clocks' owners recover some of the time they've lost.

programme.desc: Clockmaker Takumi Ada spends his days repairing clocks damaged in a massive earthquake that struck the Noto Peninsula in 2024. He also helps the clocks' owners recover some of the time they've lost.

programme.title: The World Is Filled with Words
programme.desc: What are "words"? What does it mean to communicate? Deaf photographer Saito Harumichi seeks answers as he raises his hearing children and prepares an exhibition reflecting his quest for connection.

programme.title: Century Signboards
programme.desc: An oasis in the heart of Tokyo with ties to the post-World War II US occupation, this restaurant has shaped Japanese food trends for over 100 years.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: DOSUKOI Sumo Salon
programme.desc: Although it is rarely seen in regular bouts, usage of the underarm throw increases in high-stakes championship matches. We relive legendary moments and learn the secrets users of the technique.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: CYCLE AROUND JAPAN Highlights
programme.sub-title: Kiso Three Rivers - Going with the Flow
programme.desc: Our cyclist travels three large rivers in central Japan: the Kiso, the Nagara and the Ibi. He explores unique cultures related to the rivers, like cormorant fishing and an exciting float festival.

programme.title: The Wakey Show
programme.desc: This episode features "FUNclusion Day," a day when people with and without disabilities can enjoy playing and chatting together, as well as other fun segments. It energizes kids.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: J-MELO
programme.desc: Tune in to J-MELO for great Japanese music! This week: Tsubaki Factory (a popular group in the Hello! Project collective) and Fukuhara Miho (a singer-songwriter with a soulful voice).

programme.title: Little Charo
programme.desc: Little Charo is an animation series about a Japanese dog who got lost in NY. "I want to see my owner again!" Charo starts his adventure back home. Season 1-10.

programme.title: Japanology Plus mini
programme.desc: In Japan, garbage is incinerated before being used for land reclamation, but space is running out. We explore new approaches to waste, such as biogas power generation and a litter-picking app.

programme.title: A Cat's-Eye View of Japan
programme.desc: Oolong lives at a guesthouse in Atami, a city nestled between the mountains and the sea. Elsewhere, six cats live in a house with an ocean view. They sometimes sit in on their owner's yoga lessons.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Laugh Then Think: Japan's Offbeat Sci...
programme.desc: An investigation of a female insect with a penis-like sex organ earned entomologist Yoshizawa Kazunori an Ig Nobel Prize in 2017. We learn about his lifelong quest to identify unknown species.

programme.title: Core Kyoto mini
programme.desc: The Culture of Gold Leaf, gossamer layers beget profound beauty. Dive deep into the ancient capital, still innovative 1,200 years after its foundation.

programme.title: Easy Japanese for Work
programme.sub-title: Identifying your chance to speak at a meeting
programme.desc: Today: identifying your chance to speak at a meeting. Timothy James Mahrt, from the United States, works at an IT firm in Tokyo. He has difficulty finding the right time to speak up.

programme.title: Zero Waste Life
programme.desc: Clockmaker Takumi Ada spends his days repairing clocks damaged in a massive earthquake that struck the Noto Peninsula in 2024. He also helps the clocks' owners recover some of the time they've lost.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Somewhere Street
programme.desc: Dumaguete, "the City of Gentle People", is on Negros Island in the tropical Philippines. It's a town of calm, kind-hearted people with several universities that add youthful, intellectual energy.

programme.title: The seasons of Yamato
programme.desc: A series of poetic videos by Koichi Hozan, a videographer living in Nara, in collaboration with a pianist, Mine Kawakami, for which she plays exclusive pieces, makes you experience each seasons.

programme.title: GRAND SUMO Highlights
programme.desc: NHK WORLD-JAPAN presents a sumo highlights program for fans around the globe. Today the show features all top-division bouts from March 10, Day 3 of the Grand Sumo Tournament in Osaka.

programme.title: Sumopedia
programme.desc: Sumopedia enriches your sumo experience with insights into the sport's techniques, traditions and legendary wrestlers. While the rules are simple, this iconic Japanese sport has far more depth than meets the eye.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Chatroom Japan
programme.sub-title: Are You Proud of Your International Background?
programme.desc: A Chinese woman living in Japan holds gatherings for Chinese children with the goal of boosting their confidence in their international background.

programme.title: IMPACTS: Climates Change the World
programme.desc: Food waste is a major driver of global warming. One institute warns that greenhouse gas emissions from food waste exceed those of nations like India and Russia. We examine the data behind this issue.

programme.title: DESIGN MUSEUM JAPAN
programme.desc: Hishikawa Seiichi (Video and craft artist) visits Tottori. Dyeing firms make fishing flags with vivid, hand-drawn designs that carry the feelings of both fishermen and people sending them gifts.

programme.title: The Factory Wonders
programme.desc: Our team visits a heat-resistant glass factory in Koga, Ibaraki Pref., to witness the skills of the glassblowers and lampworkers, and learn about the secrets that heat-resistant glass holds.

programme.title: Time-lapse Japan
programme.desc: Delicious Tosa bonito spoils easily and its flavour can vary a lot. Fishmongers at a local port know exactly how to spot the best ones. Watch them in action in time-lapse.

programme.title: BOSAI: Science that Can Save Your Life
programme.desc: What is causing the frequent torrential rain and floods in Japan? Linear rainbands. Find out why this phenomenon is hard to predict and the latest research on forecasting linear rainbands.

programme.title: Upstream Color
programme.desc: A woman is abducted and hypnotised with an organic material harvested from a specific flower. When she falls for a man, the two realise he may also have been subjected to the same process.

programme.title: Under The Silver Lake
programme.desc: Sam, a disenchanted 33-year-old finds a mysterious woman in his apartment's pool. When she vanishes, he embarks on a quest across LA, leading him down a path of mystery.

programme.title: Lords of Chaos
programme.desc: The origins of Norwegian Black Metal and a group of young men with a flair for publicity, church-burning...and murder.

programme.title: Vesper
programme.desc: Struggling to survive with her father after the collapse of Earth's ecosystem, 13-year-old Vesper must use her wits, strength and bio-hacking abilities to fight for the future.

programme.title: Hardware
programme.desc: In an America ravaged by atomic warfare, nomads spend their days scavenging for scrap. That's how an ex-soldier acquires spare android parts, which turn into a robot programmed to destroy humans.

programme.title: Children of the Corn
programme.desc: While driving through Nebraska two young lovers stumble upon a cult made up of murderous, demon-worshiping children. Based on a Stephen King horror story.

programme.title: Children of the Corn II: Final Sacrifice
programme.desc: When the mutilated bodies of adults are found in Nebraska no one believes that the killers could be children hiding in the cornfields. A journalist covering the story delves into the truth.

programme.title: Children of the Corn III: Urban Harvest
programme.desc: Act three in the horror series based on a Stephen King story. Two brothers are adopted by a family. Deadly occurrences follow, amid revelations that one boy was in a bizarre cult in Nebraska.

programme.title: Audition
programme.desc: A widower accepts his friend's offer to audition girls in order to search for his new wife. However, the girl he likes does not appear to be the one she claims to be.

programme.title: The Hitcher
programme.desc: A young man who escapes the clutches of a murderous hitchhiker is subsequently stalked by the hitcher and framed for his crimes.

programme.title: Black Robe
programme.desc: In 1634 a Jesuit missionary sets out to convert the tribes in Huron Indian country. A culture-clashing masterpiece from Australian director Bruce Beresford.

programme.title: Dollman vs. Demonic Toys
programme.desc: Judith Grey teams with Brick Bardo (Dollman) and his girlfriend Ginger to face the evil Demonic Toys for one final battle.

programme.title: Jungle
programme.desc: An enthusiastic young adventurer follows his dreams into the Amazon jungle with two friends and a guide with a mysterious past.

programme.title: Dust Devil
programme.desc: A woman on the run from her abusive husband encounters a mysterious hitch-hiker.

programme.title: Top Knot Detective
programme.desc: Takashi Takamoto begins writing jingles for a well-known Japanese company and ends up creating a bloody series of samurai action that, over time, becomes a cult series.

programme.title: Cypher
programme.desc: Paranoia drives this hi-tech cyber thriller when a computer programmer who turns to corporate espionage is caught in a spiral where even his own identity is put in doubt.

programme.title: Vivarium
programme.desc: A young couple looking for the perfect home find themselves trapped in a mysterious labyrinth-like neighbourhood of identical houses.

programme.title: Joint Security Area
programme.desc: After a shooting incident at the North-South Korean border DMZ leaves two North Korean soldiers dead, a neutral Swiss and Swedish team investigates what actually happened.

programme.title: Police Story
programme.desc: A kung-fu policeman (Jackie Chan) must protect a female witness (Brigitte Lin) from a Hong Kong drug lord for whom she used to work.

programme.title: To Catch A Killer: Part 1
programme.desc: As he investigates the missing person report of a teenager, detective Kozenczak becomes concerned that local businessman John Wayne Gacy may be responsible. However, their evidence is circumstantial.

programme.title: Winnie the Pooh: Blood and Honey
programme.desc: After Christopher Robin abandons them for college, Pooh and Piglet embark on a bloody rampage as they search for a new source of food.

programme.title: Oasis
programme.desc: An irresponsible and childish ex-con befriends a girl with cerebral palsy and develops a progressively stronger bond with her.

programme.title: Sasquatch Sunset
programme.desc: In the misty forests of North America, a family of Sasquatches find themselves on a collision course with the ever-changing world around them.

programme.title: All Hallows' Eve
programme.desc: On Halloween, a babysitter finds an old VHS tape in the kids' trick or treat bag. The tape features three tales of terror, all linked together by a murderous clown.

programme.title: The Collector
programme.desc: As the seconds tick down to midnight, an ex-con becomes a reluctant hero trapped by a masked "Collector" in a maze of lethal invention while trying to rescue the very family he came to rob.

programme.title: The Paper Tigers
programme.desc: Three Kung Fu prodigies have grown into washed-up, middle-aged men. But when their master is murdered, they must juggle their dead-end jobs, dad duties, and old grudges to avenge his death.

programme.title: Demonic Toys
programme.desc: Two gunrunners and a pregnant policewoman (Tracy Scoggins) are trapped in a warehouse with a bad boy's toys.

programme.title: Crabs!
programme.desc: In the middle of prom night, a swarm of murderous crabs descends upon a small coastal town.

programme.title: New Life
programme.desc: A mysterious woman on the run, and the resourceful fixer assigned to bring her in. Their two unique stories inextricably link, as the stakes of the pursuit rise to apocalyptic proportions.

programme.title: Caligula: The Ultimate Cut
programme.desc: Excess, violence and corruption mark the notorious emperor's reign in first-century Rome.

programme.title: Showgirls
programme.desc: Nomi Malone has what it takes to make it as a Las Vegas showgirl - what she doesn't have is a way in. To survive, she accepts the only job available, lap dancing at a seedy club.

programme.title: A Bittersweet Life
programme.desc: A gangster starts a violent feud after he refuses to kill his boss's cheating girlfriend.

programme.title: Project Wolf Hunting
programme.desc: When dangerous criminals on a cargo ship are transported from the Phillipines to South Korea, they unleash a sinister force after an escape attempt leads to a riot. (Subtitles)

programme.title: The Raid
programme.desc: A SWAT team is trapped in a tenement run by a ruthless mobster and his army of killers and thugs. Stranded on the sixth floor, they must fight their way through the city's worst to survive.

programme.title: Pulse
programme.desc: An employee of a floral shop hangs himself when a colleague goes to his apartment to investigate his absence from work.

programme.title: The Parts You Lose
programme.desc: A young boy in a small North Dakota town befriends a potentially dangerous fugitive.

programme.title: God is a Bullet
programme.desc: After his ex-wife is murdered and his daughter is kidnapped by a cult, Bob Hightower, infiltrates the group to hunt down their leader with the help of the cult's only female victim escapee.

programme.title: Sound of Silence
programme.desc: Emma must uncover the dark secret behind a cursed radio to survive and protect her family.

programme.title: Color Out Of Space
programme.desc: A family's retreat to rural life quickly crumbles when a meteorite crashes into their front yard. They attempt to battle a nebulous entity that they can barely understand.

programme.title: The Navigator: A Medieval Odyssey
programme.desc: A young 14th Century boy with acute psychic powers believes that he can rescue his fellow villagers by tunnelling their way through the earth. To their surprise they come out in New Zealand in 1988.

programme.title: Timecrimes
programme.desc: A man accidentally gets into a time machine and travels back in time nearly an hour. Finding himself will be the first of a series of disasters of unforeseeable consequences.

programme.title: The Stunt man
programme.desc: A fugitive stumbles onto a movie set just when they need a new stunt man, takes the job as a way to hide out and falls for the leading lady while facing off with his manipulative director.

programme.title: Prisoners Of The Ghostland
programme.desc: In the treacherous frontier city of Samurai Town, a notorious criminal must break an evil curse in order to rescue an abducted girl who has mysteriously disappeared.

programme.title: Sympathy For The Devil
programme.desc: After being forced to drive a mysterious passenger at gunpoint, a man finds himself in a high-stakes game of cat and mouse where it becomes clear that not everything is as it seems.

programme.title: Infernal Affairs
programme.desc: China. Chen Wing Yan, a young police officer, has been sent undercover as a mole in the local mafia. Lau Kin Ming, a young mafia member, infiltrates the police force. (Subtitles)

programme.title: Apex
programme.desc: A group of elite hunters pay to hunt down a man on a deserted island, only to find themselves becoming the prey.

programme.title: G.I. Samurai
programme.desc: A squadron of Japanese Self-Defence Force soldiers find themselves transported through time to their country's warring states era, when rival samurai clans were battling to become the supreme Shogun.

programme.title: Night of the Living Dead
programme.desc: The radiation from a fallen satellite causes the recently deceased to rise from the grave and seek the living to use as food.

programme.title: Open Your Eyes
programme.desc: A very handsome gentleman finds the love of his life, but suffers an accident and needs to have his face reconstructed through surgery after being severely disfigured.

programme.title: The Holy Mountain
programme.desc: A Mexican master (Alexandro Jodorowsky) leads a Christ figure (Horacio Salinas) and other disciples to a mountain of immortal wise men.

programme.title: Synchronic
programme.desc: Two New Orleans paramedics' lives are ripped apart after they encounter a series of horrific deaths linked to a designer drug with bizarre, other-worldly effects.

programme.title: What Lies Below
programme.desc: A 16-year-old girl returns home from camp and learns her mother has a new boyfriend, one she intends to marry; a man whose charm, intelligence and beauty make him look like he's not human at all.

programme.title: Corrective Measures
programme.desc: When a powerless new inmate arrives at a prison for supervillains, he must choose his friends wisely, or become a pawn in the deadly game between the Warden and the world's greatest criminal mastermind, The Lobe.

programme.title: The Thicket
programme.desc: When a bounty hunter and a band of unlikely heroes pursue a brutal killer, they find themselves in a deadly no-man's-land known as the Thicket.

programme.title: You Don't Nomi
programme.desc: Trace Paul Verhoeven's Showgirls (1995) redemptive journey from notorious flop to cult classic, and maybe even masterpiece.

programme.title: I Saw The Devil
programme.desc: The line between good and evil begins to blur when a special agent goes on the hunt for a serial killer who brutally murdered his pregnant fiancee.

programme.title: Eaten Alive
programme.desc: Psychotic redneck Judd owns a dilapidated hotel in rural Texas, where he murders people and then feeds their remains to his large pet crocodile in the swamp beside his hotel.

programme.title: You Were Never Really Here
programme.desc: Joe (Joaquin Phoenix) is a hired gun who rescues trafficked girls, using brutal methods against those responsible.

programme.title: Hardware
programme.desc: In an America ravaged by atomic warfare, nomads spend their days scavenging for scrap. That's how an ex-soldier acquires spare android parts, which turn into a robot programmed to destroy humans.

programme.title: Wasabi

programme.desc: While on her second honeymoon, World War II nurse Claire Randall is mysteriously transported back in time to 1743 Scotland where she is kidnapped by a group of Highlanders and meets a young man named Jamie.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire is taken to Castle Leoch, where she meets the Laird. As suspicions about her identity run high, Claire tries to blend in, and befriends the mysterious Geillis Duncan.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: As Castle Leoch is readied for a gathering of the MacKenzie clan, Claire attempts to treat a young poisoning victim, placing her at odds with a powerful priest who demands to perform an exorcism.

programme.desc: As Claire lays plans to escape during the Gathering, the rivalry between Jamie and Dougal intensifies.

programme.desc: As she accompanies Dougal on a trip to collect the rents owed to the MacKenzies laird, Claire witnesses brutality on both sides of the conflict between the Scottish rebels and the British royal army.

programme.desc: As Claire and Dougal are brought in for questioning by a royal army commander, they come face to face with the sadistic Black Jack Randall.

programme.desc: Claire and Jamie throw an elaborate dinner party intended to derail investors in Prince Charles' war effort. Meanwhile, Claire reveals to Jamie that Jack Randall is alive.

programme.title: QI
programme.desc: Stephen Fry has a jolly good time in the company of Julia Zemiro, Tim Vine, Rob Brydon, and Alan Davies.

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon, Lee Mack, and David Mitchell return for an episode of previously unseen material from the hit comedy panel show.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby is unimpressed by talk of extraterrestrial killings, after two bodies are found in crop circles. He is sure they are dealing with a human murderer.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: PC Joe Penhale has an unexpected visitor- his ex wife, who has completely forgotten that they split up years ago. He realises she is clearly unwell when she tells him it's 2008.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Father Brown investigates when the son of a duke is abducted from Lady Felicia's Yuletide ball. Can he find the child in time for Christmas?

programme.title: QI

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?

programme.desc: Dawn changes her mind and decides to stay and try and take Joe for everything he's got.
